facts.text: FitnessCombiner has a 5th fitness axis called 'engagement' with weight 0.25. Weights rebalanced to: novelty(0.25), quality(0.25), technical(0.15), diversity(0.10), engagement(0.25).
EngagementFitness computes a 0-1 score from PostHog experiment data: 0.3×dwellRate + 0.2×scrollDepth + 0.3×interactionRate + 0.2×retentionScore. Each component normalized to 0-1.
New variants that have no PostHog data yet receive engagement=0.5 (neutral) so they don't get penalized before being tested.

PostHogClient wraps posthog-node to send server-side events (generation_started, generation_completed, generation_failed, variant_deployed, variant_promoted, variant_retired) to the PostHog project via puenteworks.com/ph proxy.
posthog-node is added as a direct dependency in package.json.

SlotManager manages named site regions (slots). Each slot has: id, page path, allowed domains, active variant (htmlPath, experimentId, fitness, deployedAt), optional challenger variant. State persisted to JSON on disk.
Slots are added in phases: Phase 1 = home-hero. Phase 2 = about-background, blog-header. Phase 3 = nav-accent, footer-art, 404-page.
Each slot on kyanitelabs.tech pages is an iframe or div loaded via PostHog feature flag.
HTMLWrapper.wrap() injects PostHog bootstrap snippet when LIMINAL_POSTHOG_KEY env var is set.
All CSP variants updated to allow connect-src to puenteworks.com/ph.
LivingSiteDaemon runs a loop every 6 hours: check→promote→generate→deploy→experiment.
Min 200 visitors per variant before promotion evaluation.
Weekly wildcard variant with novelty-biased weights (novelty 0.5, engagement 0.1).
All variants must pass RenderAndScorePipeline with min score 0.2.
Files deployed to /var/www/kyanitelabs/liminal-asset/.
CLI: liminal site evolve --once --dry-run --slot.
Server-side PostHog events per generation cycle.
No behavior change without LIMINAL_POSTHOG_KEY env var.
Each slot gets its own MAP-Elites grid instance.
All existing tests pass after changes.
